ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Riaccesi Academy in Palermo. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 337-338 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) See also Gio. Battista Vallegio, Discorso a favore dell`acqua fredda del dottor D. Gio. Battista Vallegio nell`Accademia de` Riaccesi di Palermo detto l`Invigorito con alcume rime del medesimo, Palermo, Diego Bua, 1664.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
